fields.label: Access Token
fields.helpText: Generate at your Penpot instance -> Profile -> Access Tokens

fields.label: Instance URL
fields.helpText: Your Penpot instance URL (defaults to penpot.app cloud)

healthcheck_config.description: Validates access token via Penpot get-profile endpoint

metadata.summary: Penpot open-source design platform for prototyping, components, and design tokens.
metadata.setup_guide:
1. Log in to your Penpot instance (design.penpot.app or self-hosted).
2. Go to Profile -> Access Tokens.
3. Create a new token and copy it.
4. Paste the token here. If self-hosted, also enter your instance URL.
